zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise Bassett於1182年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾維可姆時，她的父親Sir Alan Basset27歲，母親Aline de Gai23歲。她於1202年與William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾瓦可利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1249年在英國享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可可爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise Bassett于1182年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾維可姆时，她的父亲Sir Alan Basset27岁，母亲Aline de Gai23岁。她于1202年与William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾瓦可利结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1249年在英国享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可可爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise Bassett was born in 1182, in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Alan Basset, was 27 and her mother, Aline de Gai, was 23. She married William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern in 1202, in Wakerley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1249, in England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Colchester, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise Bassett est née en 1182, à Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alan Basset, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Aline de Gai, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern en 1202, à Wakerley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1249, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise Bassett 1182 in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alan Basset 27 und ihre Mutter Aline de Gai 23. Sie hat 1202 in Wakerley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1249 im Alter von 67 Jahren in England und wurde in Colchester, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Bassett è nata il nel 1182 nel Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Alan Basset, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Aline de Gai, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern nel 1202, nel Wakerley, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1249, nel England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Colchester, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise Bassettが1182年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウイコンベで生まれた時，父Sir Alan Bassetは27歳，母Aline de Gaiは23歳であった。1202年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワケルリーでWilliam de Lanvallei Lord of Walkernと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1249年にイギリスで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスコルチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise Bassett(이)가 1182년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 윈이코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alan Basset(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aline de Gai(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1202년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 웨이켈를리에서 William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1249년 영국에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 코체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Bassett nasceu em 1182, em Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Alan Basset, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Aline de Gai, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern em 1202, em Wakerley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1249, em Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise Bassett родилась в 1182 г. в местности викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Alan Basset было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline de Gai, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern в 1202 г. в местности веикирли, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1249 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise Bassett nació en 1182, en Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Alan Basset, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Aline de Gai, tenía 23 años. Se casó con William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern en 1202, en Wakerley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1249, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
